scripts.db:gen-turso-sql:
prisma migrate diff --from-empty --to-schema-datamodel prisma/schema.prisma --script > prisma/turso-schema.sql && node -e "const f='prisma/turso-schema.sql',fs=require('fs'),h='-- ============================================================
-- GENERATED FILE — DO NOT EDIT BY HAND.
-- Source of truth: prisma/schema.prisma
-- Regenerate with:  npm run db:gen-turso-sql   (in packages/database)
-- Parity is enforced in CI via:  npm run db:verify-turso
-- push-turso.ts executes these statements (idempotently) against Turso.
-- ============================================================

';fs.writeFileSync(f,h+fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'))"
